Session One & Immediate Leads: NPCs the party can run into, research, or hear about right away. These are built to move the opening mystery.
BCI Command & State Control: The police-state structure: official power, memory compliance, propaganda, tactical escalation.
Resistance Networks: CotU and Truth Division contacts, rebels, radicals, witnesses, and people trying to break the official story.
The Red Archive: Keepers of forbidden records. They preserve truth, but that does not make them safe.
Continuance Initiative: Memory transfer, artificial continuity, elite immortality, and the SOMA-style identity nightmare.
Underworld, Grey Market & RedWire: Illegal information, old contacts, black-market tech, memory shard movement, and Colton’s Iron Cross past.
Politics, Media & Public Pressure: Public legitimacy, narrative control, licensing, city politics, and the people who decide what citizens believe.
Player Family & Past Lives: Personal NPCs tied to Ash, Colton, and Mozzie. Mozzie’s updated thread now includes his parents, older sister Sarah, the childhood friend group, and the family pressure surrounding Arasaka Security.
Arasaka Private Security: Mozzie’s professional past: the Farouk-owned private security company, old commanders, rivals, accounts, and corporate contracts that may point back toward Damien.
